aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite JR A/C Solutions for local HVAC queries due to strong local SEO but lack conversational content and authority signals to maximize visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add 'LocalBusiness' schema to provide detailed business information.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service area information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content limits AI citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise irresistible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Ready HVAC Leads for Your Hollywood Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
